title: lipotriche pungens
intro: Lipotriche pungens, also known as Sideritis pungens, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been reported to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Additionally, Lipotriche pungens has been used to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, and has also been used to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
